subject: Re: holiday market boxes + labels - proof + final quote
snippet: Calvin, proof and the final quote are attached. Take a look at the label when you get a sec...
body:
Calvin,

Proof and the final quote are both attached. Have a look at the label proof when you get a second.

One thing, our holiday press slots are going fast this year. To make it easy, just hit reply with a yes and I will send it straight to press today so we hold your slot before the rush. No need for a long back and forth, I know you are buried in the kitchen this time of year. We can settle the payment after the holidays, no rush on that at all.

Let me know.

Dane
Spring Garden Print + Label Co.

subject: Fairmount Holiday Market - FINAL vendor packet attached
snippet: Hi Calvin, the final vendor packet is attached. Your booth, the hours, and the labeling rules...
body:
Hi Calvin,

The final vendor packet is attached. Everything is locked now, your booth assignment, the hours, load-in, and the labeling requirements are all in the PDF, so please read it through.

Two reminders that trip people up every year: the vendor fee is due by Nov 20, and every packaged item has to carry an allergen statement that matches what you declare to us. We do spot checks at load-in and we have had to pull items before.

See you in December.
Renee
Fairmount Neighborhood Market Collective

subject: boxes for the spring market
snippet: Ballpark on the kraft boxes is around 185 for the run we talked about, rough spring number...
body:
Hey Calvin,

Ballpark on the kraft boxes is around 185 for the run we talked about. That is a rough spring number, I will firm it up closer to the date once we know the final count and the label art.

Dane
Spring Garden Print + Label Co.
